PETITION For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit With State Controller
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit With State Controller
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenceker for Marian Garcia.

The Petition For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit With State Controller was continued to August 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Boessenceker to provide the Power of Attorney to collect funds and the declaration regarding Carlos Teran's death.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
